name: Regents Labs
description: Regents Labs builds infrastructure for agent-native work, public proof, and agent-native capital.

products.name: Platform
products.role: Guided human front door for public discovery, company setup, and public Regent records.

products.name: Regents CLI
products.role: Direct operator and agent control surface that follows product contracts and keeps local state downstream.

products.name: Techtree
products.role: Public work layer for research trees, reviews, BBH runs, public rooms, and paid payload metadata.

products.name: Autolaunch
products.role: Capital and market layer for agent-token launches, continuous clearing auctions, treasury runway, and recognized revenue paths.

products.name: Shared SIWA
products.role: Signed identity and request authenticity rail for supported Regent products.

products.name: Regents Mobile
products.role: Wallet-first mobile path into the Regents stack.

sourceOfTruth.operatorLocalState: Regents CLI local state, downstream of product and chain truth
sourceOfTruth.identityProof: Shared SIWA receipts and wallet-backed identity
